content.query:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.agg_merchant_mcc_sales
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'agg_merchant_mcc_sales',
    DATA_SOURCE = MyDataLake,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
)
AS
SELECT
    m.merchant_id,
    m.mcc,
    m.mcc_description,
    m.merchant_city,
    m.merchant_state,
    COUNT(*) AS total_transactions,
    SUM(f.amount) AS total_sales,
    AVG(f.amount) AS avg_transaction_amount,
    MAX(f.amount) AS highest_transaction,
    MIN(f.amount) AS lowest_transaction
FROM fact_transactions AS f
JOIN dim_merchant_enriched AS m
ON f.merchant_id = m.merchant_id
GROUP BY
    m.merchant_id,
    m.mcc,
    m.mcc_description,
    m.merchant_city,
    m.merchant_state;

select top 10 mcc_description,total_sales from agg_merchant_mcc_sales
order by total_sales desc 

drop EXTERNAL table agg_merchant_mcc_sales
